description: Content categories for video and clip generation: 25 conspiracy methods in separate sections. All award unified points. Used for both full documentary and quick clip.

sections.name: General
sections.description: Standard documentary or clip; no specific theory type.

sections.name: Political & power
sections.description: Conspiracies about governments, deep state, elections, and hidden power.

sections.name: Religious & prophecy
sections.description: End-times, prophecies, secret religious agendas, and faith-based conspiracy ideas.

sections.name: Health & science
sections.description: Pandemics, Big Pharma, climate, and mainstream science as cover-up.

sections.name: Historical & cover-ups
sections.description: Assassinations, hidden history, and suppressed events.

sections.name: Extraterrestrial & occult
sections.description: UFOs, aliens, hollow Earth, secret societies, and occult elite.

sections.name: Economic & control
sections.description: Banking, central banks, population and resource control.

sections.name: Media & narrative control
sections.description: Media manipulation, surveillance, and mind control.

sections.name: Alternative / unnormal theories
sections.description: Non-mainstream and alternative explanations; contrast to conspiracy.

categories.name: General (no conspiracy)
categories.description: Standard documentary or clip; no specific theory type.
categories.context: Standard documentary or short clip. No conspiracy or alternative theory angle.

categories.name: Deep state / shadow government
categories.description: Hidden unelected elite controlling policy behind the scenes.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about a deep state or shadow government: unelected officials, intelligence agencies, or bureaucrats secretly controlling national and global policy regardless of who is elected.

categories.name: False flag operations
categories.description: Staged attacks or events blamed on others to justify war or policy.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about false flag operations: governments or groups staging attacks, terror events, or crises and blaming others to justify war, surveillance, or political agendas.

categories.name: New World Order / globalists
categories.description: Elite plan for a single global government and controlled society.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about a New World Order or globalist elite: a planned single world government, erosion of sovereignty, and a controlled society run by a small group of powerful figures.

categories.name: Election / vote fraud
categories.description: Rigged elections, stolen votes, and manipulated outcomes.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about election or vote fraud: rigged voting machines, stolen ballots, media collusion, or foreign interference to fix electoral outcomes.

categories.name: Religious prophecy / end-times
categories.description: Biblical or religious prophecies, end-times, and hidden divine plans.
categories.context: Religious conspiracy ideas: end-times prophecy, biblical signs, secret religious agendas, or belief that current events fulfill ancient prophecies or divine plans.

categories.name: Secret societies (Illuminati, etc.)
categories.description: Hidden societies controlling world events and symbolism.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about secret societies such as the Illuminati, Freemasons, or other closed groups: hidden symbolism, coordinated control of events, and ancient plans for world domination.

categories.name: Mind control / MK-Ultra type
categories.description: Government or elite programs to control thoughts and behavior.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about mind control: MK-Ultra-style programs, behavioral engineering, subliminal messaging, or elite use of psychology and media to control populations.

categories.name: Pandemic / health hoax
categories.description: Pandemics or health crises as manufactured or exaggerated for control.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory that pandemics or major health crises are hoaxed, exaggerated, or manufactured to justify lockdowns, mandates, or control over populations.

categories.name: Big Pharma / drug suppression
categories.description: Pharmaceutical industry hiding cures and pushing harmful drugs.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about Big Pharma: suppressed cures, harmful drugs pushed for profit, and collusion with regulators to keep alternative or natural treatments off the market.

categories.name: Climate change hoax
categories.description: Climate crisis as a manufactured narrative for control or profit.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory that climate change or global warming is a hoax or exaggerated narrative used for control, taxation, or profit by elites and corporations.

categories.name: Flat Earth / hidden geography
categories.description: Earth shape and geography as lied about by authorities.
categories.context: Conspiracy or alternative theory about Earth's shape or geography: flat Earth, hidden continents, or that mainstream geography and space agencies are lying about the true nature of the world.

categories.name: Moon landing hoax
categories.description: Moon landings faked in studios; space program as deception.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory that the Moon landings were faked in television studios and that the space program is used to deceive the public and drain resources.

categories.name: Assassination cover-ups (JFK, etc.)
categories.description: Political assassinations with hidden perpetrators and covered-up evidence.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about political assassinations such as JFK: multiple shooters, covered-up evidence, and hidden perpetrators or agencies behind the killings.

categories.name: UFO / alien cover-up
categories.description: Governments hiding contact with extraterrestrials and UFO evidence.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory that governments and agencies are covering up UFO sightings, alien contact, and reverse-engineered technology from non-human sources.

categories.name: Hollow Earth / inner world
categories.description: Earth is hollow with inner civilizations or realms.
categories.context: Conspiracy or alternative theory that Earth is hollow, with inner worlds, civilizations, or entrances at the poles kept secret by authorities.

categories.name: Banking / central bank cartel
categories.description: Central banks and bankers controlling economy and society.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about a banking or central bank cartel: control of money supply, engineered crises, and elites using finance to dominate nations and populations.

categories.name: Media manipulation / mainstream narrative
categories.description: Mainstream media pushing a single narrative and hiding truth.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory that mainstream media is controlled or coordinated to push a single narrative, suppress dissent, and hide inconvenient truths from the public.

categories.name: Mass surveillance / privacy
categories.description: Total surveillance of citizens by governments and corporations.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory about mass surveillance: governments and tech giants spying on everyone, erosion of privacy, and use of data for control or persecution.

categories.name: Population control / depopulation
categories.description: Elite plans to reduce or control global population.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory that elites are pursuing population control or depopulation through policy, health interventions, or other means to maintain power and resources.

categories.name: Food / water / supply control
categories.description: Control of food, water, and supply chains to dominate populations.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory that food, water, and supply chains are being controlled or monopolized by elites to create dependency and control over populations.

categories.name: Alternative history / hidden past
categories.description: Suppressed or rewritten history and hidden civilizations.
categories.context: Conspiracy or alternative theory that mainstream history is wrong or suppressed: hidden civilizations, rewritten timelines, or covered-up historical events.

categories.name: Ancient astronauts / lost civilizations
categories.description: Ancient contact with advanced beings or lost high civilizations.
categories.context: Conspiracy or alternative theory about ancient astronauts, lost advanced civilizations, or contact between ancient humans and non-human intelligence, suppressed by mainstream archaeology.

categories.name: Occult practices of elite
categories.description: Elites using occult or ritual practices for power.
categories.context: Conspiracy theory that political and financial elites engage in occult, ritual, or symbolic practices to maintain power or communicate with hidden forces.

categories.name: General conspiracy (catch-all)
categories.description: Conspiracy angle without a specific method; general hidden forces.
categories.context: General conspiracy theory: hidden forces, cover-ups, or coordinated elite action without specifying a single method. Catch-all for mixed or unspecified conspiracy content.

categories.name: Alternative / unnormal theory
categories.description: Non-mainstream or alternative explanation; not necessarily conspiracy.
categories.context: Alternative or unnormal theory: non-mainstream explanations, fringe science, or unconventional views that contrast with both mainstream and classic conspiracy narratives.
